actionCalls.description: Calls the AgentListCustomObjects Apex action to return a list of all custom objects in the org with their API names, labels, and metadata.
actionCalls.name: List_Custom_Objects
actionCalls.label: List Custom Objects

Flow.interviewLabel: WSM - ALF - Agent: List Custom Objects {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: WSM - ALF - Agent: List Custom Objects

variables.description: When true, includes custom objects from installed managed packages (objects with a namespace prefix like ns__Object__c). Defaults to false to show only objects created directly in this org.
variables.name: includeManagedPackageObjects

variables.description: Optional keyword to filter the results. Only objects whose API name or label contains this text (case-insensitive) are returned. Leave blank to return all custom objects.
variables.name: filterKeyword

variables.description: JSON array of custom objects found. Each element contains apiName, label, pluralLabel, isCreateable, isQueryable, and keyPrefix. Parse this to find the object you need, then use Describe Object Schema to get its fields.
variables.name: objectsJson

variables.description: Total number of custom objects returned. Use this to confirm results were found before parsing the JSON.
variables.name: objectCount

variables.description: True if the custom objects were retrieved successfully, false if there was an error. Always check this before using the results.
variables.name: success

variables.description: Description of the error when success is false. Empty when success is true.
variables.name: errorMessage
